_comment: Copy to <project>/.mcp.json, drop the leading underscore from each server you want to enable, and fill in any placeholders. Docs: https://modelcontextprotocol.io/examples

_memory.instructions: Persistent knowledge graph. Enable for projects where cross-session memory matters.

_filesystem.instructions: Read/write a specific directory. Scope tightly — do not point at $HOME.

_github._comment: GitHub's official MCP server (Go binary, run via Docker image ghcr.io/github/github-mcp-server). Replaces the deprecated @modelcontextprotocol/server-github npm package. Source: https://github.com/github/github-mcp-server
